local_processing: Parse and normalize bank and accounting rows

codex_context.purpose: Resolve mappings and review unmatched or ambiguous transactions
codex_context.content: Headers, aggregate controls, matched summaries, exception rows and selected transaction evidence
codex_context.minimum_necessary: Use aggregates and exception rows rather than complete bank and journal populations

residual_risks.risk: Exception rows can include account holders, counterparties and payment descriptions
residual_risks.mitigation: Keep complete statements and ledgers local; expose only mappings, controls and exceptions

commercialista_notice.message_it: Estratti conto e registri completi vengono elaborati localmente. Codex esamina controlli aggregati, abbinamenti ed eccezioni con le sole righe necessarie alla revisione.
commercialista_notice.message_en: Complete statements and journals are processed locally. Codex reviews aggregate controls, matches and exceptions with only the rows needed for review.

limitations: Ambiguous descriptions can require targeted supporting evidence
This is a design-time data-flow review, not a GDPR legal determination
